---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear, short description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Enable / disable '...' (e.g. HUD, CLS viz)
3. Do '...' (e.g. scroll, click, reload)
4. See error or wrong behavior

## Expected behavior

What you expected to see.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (e.g. no overlay, wrong value, console error).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Edge 120]
- Extension version: [e.g. 0.1.0 or commit]
- Page (if relevant): [e.g. https://example.com or “any page”]

## Console / DevTools

If there are errors in the extension or page console, paste them here (or a screenshot).

## Additional context

Any other details, screenshots, or a minimal page that reproduces the issue.
